nodes.title: How to use
widgets_values:
# Recommendation
Input image: Chuck into your image editing model of choice and replace the background with plain white. This (sometimes) helps the model keep the original background of the video in replace mode.


# Instructions

Set frame load cap in Load Video Node (if Cap > Video Length it will auto limit to full video)
(Optional) Skip first frames if needed

Describe video in Clip Text Encode (green box above).
The more accurate the description, the better the gen will match the originial

Describe what is to be segmented from the original video in Clip Text Encode (grey box below, in the segmentation section).
If there are multiple people and you only want one, describe where they are. If you want multiple people, increase the number of max_objects in both of the SAM3 Video Track nodes below, as needed. You can also set max_objects to zero, which will let it automatically find people.
Note that SAM3 can identify non-human objects, but SCAIL cannot replace them.
